description: Two showcase pilots selected for detailed presentation in manuscript and reports. Two solid showcases, not twelve half-examples.

selection_rationale: Strongest detection signal among all pilots
Out of socio-economic domain — demonstrates cross-domain generality
5 class labels (Z, O, N, F, S) enabling multi-regime analysis
EEG data is well-established benchmark in signal processing
presentation_focus: ORI-C Cap(t) and Sigma(t) across seizure/non-seizure classes
Threshold detection on C(t) aligned with known epileptic transitions
Causal test results: Granger, bootstrap CI, cointegration
Comparison with standard EEG classification baselines

selection_rationale: Clear volatility regime transition detectable by ORI-C
Demonstrates portability to market dynamics and financial time series
Borderline power but still conclusive — shows framework robustness
BTC price dynamics are widely studied and understood
presentation_focus: ORI-C regime detection on BTC price/volatility series
Threshold detection aligned with known market regime shifts
Power class borderline: transparency about statistical limitations
Contrast with Solar (physical system) to show domain breadth

alternative_secondary.note: Solar is an equally valid secondary showcase (physical system, adequate power, 288 points). Use if astrophysical portability is prioritised over financial.
